items.title: The worst dotcom bubble investing mistakes are coming for your portfolio. Avoid them
items.description: Investors can learn from the mistakes that sank stock portfolios in the early 2000s dotcom crash when many became overly concentrated in the technology sector.

items.title: Google expands Gemini lineup with cheaper models and new Mythos rival
items.description: Google is expanding Gemini with cheaper, more efficient models and a new cybersecurity offering as it tries to close product gaps and compete on cost.

items.title: Jim Cramer says he's standing by Eli Lilly after rival's GLP-1 lawsuit. Here's why
items.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

items.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano laughs off JPMorgan spying allegations
items.description: Bisignano denied allegations The Wall Street Journal reported that he surveilled his colleagues while working at JPMorgan more than a decade ago.

items.title: OpenAI, Anthropic boost lobbying as legacy tech and defense spending slips
items.description: The two AI developers spent a combined $3.17 million in the second quarter, up 23% from the first three months of 2026.

items.title: Bessent says U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
items.description: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.title: SpaceX sets earnings date, triggering first lock-up expiration for millions of shares
items.description: SpaceX's stock gained on Tuesday and looked to snap a seven-day losing streak after announcing Aug. 4 as its maiden earnings report

items.title: Trump imposing 50% tariffs on certain Canadian goods over alleged trade discrimination
items.description: Canada's relationship with the U.S. has frayed amid Trump's tariff-heavy agenda and vocal displeasure with the nations' trilateral trade pact with Mexico.

items.title: Nebius stock surges 13% as Nvidia discloses significant stake in neocloud
items.description: Nvidia said it would invest $2 billion into Nebius in March.

items.title: GM announces new gas-powered Cadillac vehicles amid EV pullback
items.description: GM CEO Mary Barra said Tuesday the next-generation Cadillacs will include new versions of the CT5 sedan, XT5 midsize SUV and discontinued three-row XT6 SUV.

items.title: Nvidia details its next-generation Vera CPU for AI, setting up challenge to AMD and Intel
items.description: Nvidia released new information about its data center CPU, called Vera, that prospective customers need to fully evaluate the chip.

items.title: Novo Nordisk sues Eli Lilly, alleging misleading GLP-1 advertising
items.description: Novo asked the court to permanently stop Lilly from running the "deceptive" ads and require the drugmaker to issue corrective advertising.

items.title: Wall Street is selling more rental homes, as buying ban takes effect
items.description: The largest landlords are all net sellers year to date, with 3,180 more homes sold than bought since Jan. 1.

items.title: As the U.S.-Iran war heats up again, these parts of the stock market and economy could be affected
items.description: Investors and economists are deliberating what the latest exchange in hostilities will mean for the broader economy.

items.title: Property taxes are poised for major midterm elections ballot battles across many U.S. states
items.description: Americans will have a rare opportunity to use votes to directly shape tax policy with 26 ballot measures on taxation across 13 states set for midterm elections.

items.title: Samsung Electronics shares rise as robotics move highlights push into physical AI
items.description: Samsung Electronics shares rose as the company set up a robotics division in a push into physical AI.

items.title: GM beats on earnings, raises guidance amid 'resilient' consumer, pricing
items.description: GM raised several key earnings forecasts after beating Wall Street's second-quarter expectations as its North American operations continue to drive results.

items.title: Greer hints new Trump tariffs coming on dozens of countries: 'Expect action soon'
items.description: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer's comments the Trump administration could impose new tariffs just as other duties are set to expire.

items.title: U.S. strikes Iran and Houthis threaten Saudi Arabia shipping as mediators push 10-day ceasefire
items.description: The latest cycle of strikes comes amid reports that regional mediators have presented Washington and Tehran with a proposal for a 10-day ceasefire.

items.title: Intel's foundry lands first named customer under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, as Fortinet signs on for security chips
items.description: Fortinet is the first announced corporate customer for Intel's foundry under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, who took over the chipmaker in March 2025.
